common.tagline: Every game deserves a second turn

hero.lede: A peer-to-peer marketplace for pre-loved games in Latvia, Lithuania, and Estonia.
hero.imageAlt: Stack of colourful board game pieces

howItWorks.heading: List a game in three steps.

1.title: Find your game
1.body: Search the BoardGameGeek catalog and pick the exact edition you own.

2.title: Set price and condition
2.body: Grade your copy on our five-tier scale and choose a price.

3.title: Ship via parcel locker
3.body: We provide the parcel-locker label. Drop your game off; the buyer collects.

items.q: Where can I buy and sell?
items.a: We currently serve Latvia, Lithuania, and Estonia. Listings are visible to buyers in all three countries.
Sellers ship through Unisend parcel lockers. Cross-border lockers are supported across the Baltics.
Buyers pay the item price plus shipping. Sellers pay a 10% commission on the item price; shipping is not commissioned.
Sellers grade each copy on a five-tier scale: Like New, Very Good, Good, Acceptable, or For Parts. Buyers see this on every listing.
Payments are processed by EveryPay, a licensed Estonian payment institution. Sellers receive their share in a platform wallet once the order completes.
Orders include built-in deadlines for acceptance, shipping, and delivery. If a dispute is opened, we step in to help resolve it.

cta.heading: Pass them on.
cta.body: List your collection and let other gamers in the Baltics give them another turn.

staleAction.newVersionAvailable: A newer version is available. Please refresh the page.
